subject: State Farm Adjuster Roster — consolidated from captured threads
denialText: State Farm uses regional Claim Specialists routed through statefarmfireclaims@statefarm.com. Multiple specialty units (Proximity, WCCS Deployed, In-House Field). Patent-disclosed automation (US10565658 Storm event roof damage detection + US20220414781 Probable Roof Loss Confidence Scores + US10977734 real property damage claims analysis) drives initial scoping; specialists confirm via engineer reports for high-friction claims.

adjusterRoster.name: Nataleigh Cromwell, AIC, AIS
adjusterRoster.title: Claim Specialist – Proximity
adjusterRoster.denialPattern: Engineer-report triple-layer (not functionally damaged + pre-policy + cosmetic only) with combined claim numbers

adjusterRoster.name: Ian Swanson
adjusterRoster.title: Claim Specialist – WCCS Deployed
adjusterRoster.denialPattern: Catastrophe-response WCCS unit. Denial substance in attached PDF. Often rushed in-person inspections.

adjusterRoster.name: HOME CLMS-FIRECLAIMS (template sender)
adjusterRoster.title: Generic claims template
adjusterRoster.denialPattern: AI confidence below threshold → automated 'No Hail RFG Denial' template

adjusterRoster.name: HRU adjuster code
adjusterRoster.title: internal code per cheat-sheets
adjusterRoster.exampleClaim: Multiple (15 jobs, 100% approval rate, +38% vs carrier baseline)

adjusterRoster.name: Jamell Clarke
adjusterRoster.title: (Reese flag: avoid)
adjusterRoster.denialPattern: Multiple reps report denials on legit claims. Request reassignment ASAP if assigned. If stuck: detailed photos + engineer report + document everything.

templatePhrases: Please open the attachment for information regarding your claim now that the engineer report has been reviewed
Please open the attachment(s) for more claim information or next steps
Don't miss a call about your Auto/Homeowners claim from State Farm®
Text HOME to 62789 for your claim contact card
For your protection, please do not include sensitive personal information
keyDenialLanguage: the roof coverings were not functionally damaged by the reported or any recent storm event
dents on certain metal components are attributable to pre-policy storms
those metal impacts are cosmetic only
carrierTactic: State Farm uses ENGINEER REPORTS as the cover for AI-confidence-below-threshold denials. Combined-claim-number practice mixes multiple DOLs into single denials. WCCS Deployed catastrophe unit does rushed inspections. Default to 'cosmetic only' or 'pre-policy' framings when AI flags uncertainty.
rooferTactic: When State Farm cites engineer report: request the full engineer report including methodology, engineer credentials, weather data, and reconciliation of any date inconsistencies (Nataleigh Cromwell case is the canonical template). For WCCS Deployed denials: request non-WCCS adjuster reinspection. Avoid Jamell Clarke if possible.
patentMapping: US10565658 (Storm event roof damage detection) + US20220414781 (Probable Roof Loss Confidence Scores) drive initial confidence score. When below threshold: 'No Hail RFG Denial' template fires automatically. Engineer report is the human cover for AI determination.
lessonForAnalyzer: For State Farm: identify which unit (Proximity / WCCS / In-House) and which adjuster. Cross-reference with our cheat-sheets adjuster data (we have ~30+ State Farm adjusters with approval rate + stance). Counter-letter should ALWAYS request full engineer file + records preservation when engineer-report cited. For lenient adjusters (HRU): straightforward documentation suffices.
